xBRIEFInfo.author: agent:cursor
xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF for deploying the merged chord features to Fly.io

plan.title: Deploy merged chord features to Fly.io

narratives.Overview: Deploy the current main branch (commit b2cd90f) to Fly.io so the recently merged chord features reach production: guitar timbres, guitar chord voices, minor + pentatonic chord voices, and the new 'strum' playback mode. This is a deploy-only operation using the existing fly.toml / Dockerfile; no code changes.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Deploy main@b2cd90f to Fly.io via the Fly CLI using the existing fly.toml + Dockerfile config. FR-2: Do not commit, push, or modify any source; deploy-only. FR-3: After deploy, verify the app is live (HTTP 200 on the root URL) and report app name, URL, release version, and machine health. NFR-1: If the deploy fails for a non-transient reason (auth, unrecoverable build/config error), stop and report rather than making risky changes.
narratives.Assumptions: A-1: Fly CLI is installed and authenticated on this machine. A-2: fly.toml/Dockerfile are already correct from prior deploys. A-3: Remote build is acceptable (default).

items.title: Run fly deploy for main@b2cd90f and verify the live app returns HTTP 200
